div.style: font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; background: transparent; color: #ffffff; padding: 0.5rem 0 2rem; max-width: 860px; margin: 0 auto;

background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a0a0a 0%, #2d0f0f 50%, #1a0a0a 100%); border-radius: 16px; padding: 2.5rem 2rem; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 2rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255,75,75,0.3); position: relative; overflow: hidden;

width:90px; height:90px; border-radius:50%; border:2px solid #ff4b4b; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2d0f0f, #1a0a0a); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight:800; font-size:28px; color:#ffd166; margin:0 auto 1.2rem; position:relative; z-index:1; box-shadow:0 0 0 6px rgba(255,75,75,0.1);
font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight:800; font-size:36px; color:#ffffff; letter-spacing:-0.5px; position:relative; z-index:1;
font-family:'Space Mono', monospace; font-size:12px; color:#ffd166; letter-spacing:4px; text-transform:uppercase; margin-top:6px; position:relative; z-index:1;
font-family:'Space Mono', monospace; font-size:11px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); margin-top:16px; font-style:italic; position:relative; z-index:1;

div.div: Crafting stories between science, code, and cosmos

div.style: display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px; justify-content:center; margin-top:20px; position:relative; z-index:1;

a.style: display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:6px 12px; border-radius:6px; font-family:'Space Mono', monospace; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; text-decoration:none; border:1px solid rgba(255,75,75,0.4); background:rgba(255,75,75,0.15); color:#ff4b4b; cursor:pointer;

display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:6px 12px; border-radius:6px; font-family:'Space Mono', monospace; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; text-decoration:none; border:1px solid rgba(255,209,102,0.35); background:rgba(255,209,102,0.12); color:#ffd166; cursor:pointer;

background: rgba(26,10,10,0.6); border: 1px solid rgba(255,75,75,0.15); border-left: 2px solid #ff4b4b; border-radius:8px; padding:1.2rem 1.4rem; font-family:'Space Mono', monospace; font-size:12px; line-height:1.7; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8); white-space:pre; overflow-x:auto; margin-bottom:1.5rem;
